name: Nike Air Max 270
description: The Nike Air Max 270 delivers visible cushioning under every step. Updated for modern comfort, it nods to the original 180 from 1991.

name: Spalding TF-1000 Classic
description: The Spalding TF-1000 Classic is built for the highest level of competitive play. ZK microfiber composite cover for great grip and control.

name: Wilson Pro Staff 97
description: Co-designed by Roger Federer, the Pro Staff 97 delivers the pure, classic feel that players have come to love but with an all-new uncontaminated design.

name: Yonex Astrox 99 Pro
description: The Yonex Astrox 99 Pro is a power-oriented racket, designed for players who want to dominate the court with powerful smashes.
